issues: Console warning: 'In HTML, <span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor React hydration warning in SKU dropdown. This is a cosmetic issue and doesn't affect functionality.

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_edit_features.py - Created test suite for PUT endpoints
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up automatically by test suite (TEST_EDIT prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit (PUT) features for Receives, Repacks, and Wastage fully functional. Key endpoints: PUT /api/finished-product-receive/{id} (updates receive and associated finished_products), PUT /api/finished-product-repack/{id} (restores old source stock, removes old target, validates new stock, deducts FIFO, creates new target), PUT /api/finished-product-wastage/{id} (restores old stock, validates new stock, deducts FIFO). Frontend has edit buttons (pencil icons) on all three tabs that open pre-filled modals. Search SKU field filters ledger by SKU name. Date range filters work across all tabs.

put_finished_product_receive.behavior: Updates receive entry and associated finished_products record with new quantity
put_finished_product_receive.stock_handling: Sets current_stock to new quantity value

put_finished_product_repack.behavior: Restores old source stock, removes old target, validates new source stock, deducts FIFO, creates new target

put_finished_product_wastage.behavior: Restores old stock, validates new stock availability, deducts FIFO new quantity

search_sku_filter.behavior: Filters ledger items by SKU name (case-insensitive)

date_range_filter.behavior: Filters entries by date range using filterByDate() function

edit_buttons.behavior: Pencil icon buttons open pre-filled edit modals
